name: ocultar-pii
description: Zero-egress PII redaction for Claude workflows. Redacts names, emails, IBANs, SSNs, phone numbers, and credit cards before any AI processing. Runs entirely in your infrastructure — no data ever leaves your environment.
long_description:
Ocultar is a local PII detection and redaction engine. This extension gives Claude two tools:

- **refine_text** — redacts PII from any text before it reaches Claude, replacing sensitive values with deterministic tokens (e.g. `[EMAIL_9c8f7a1b]`).
- **reveal_tokens** — de-tokenizes tokens back to plaintext for authorized callers (auditor-only, every call is logged in an immutable Ed25519-signed audit trail).

All processing happens on your machine via the locally running Ocultar Refinery. If the Refinery is unreachable, both tools fail closed — raw text is never forwarded. Zero-egress is an architectural property, not a policy.

ocultar_url.title: Ocultar Refinery URL
ocultar_url.description: URL of your locally running Ocultar Refinery

ocultar_api_key.title: API Key
ocultar_api_key.description: Ocultar API key (leave blank if not configured)

ocultar_auditor_token.title: Auditor Token
ocultar_auditor_token.description: Enables the reveal_tokens tool. Must match OCU_AUDITOR_TOKEN on the server. Leave blank to disable token reveal.

tools.name: refine_text
tools.description: Redact PII from text before sending to Claude

tools.name: reveal_tokens
tools.description: De-tokenize Ocultar tokens back to plaintext (auditor-only)
